title: wolftpm-sys/Cargo.toml missing rust-version field
description: All other wolftpm crates (wolftpm, wolftpm-tss) declare rust-version = '1.71', but wolftpm-sys/Cargo.toml omits it. crates.io will not display an MSRV for wolftpm-sys, and cargo msrv checks won't catch regressions there. Fix: add rust-version = '1.71' to wolftpm-sys/Cargo.toml.
